Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Dismissing Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770; Declaration Oj Joshua D. Boxer In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RICHARD HINES's Motion For An Order Dismissing Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to dismiss class action per CRC 3.770 is granted.

Order signed.
